name: conclave-cc
description: Agentic business orchestration framework for solo founders. Installs the full Conclave system (133 agents — Chairman, CEO, all C-levels, VPs, Directors, specialists) globally in Claude Code, with bundled in-house MCPs (token usage awareness, browser automation) and a stage-gated workflow that produces a VC-ready due diligence document package end-to-end.
author: einstenthedeveloper
